Klein Moretti.primary_clothing: linen shirt (confirmed worn during this scene)
Klein Moretti.face_description: average-looking features with a rather deep outline; distinct scholarly air; temples show grotesque wound with burn marks in chapter opening scene
Klein Moretti.visual_anchor: early 20s male, brown eyes that turn deep black during divination, holding a silver-inlaid black cane
Klein Moretti.distinguishing_features: graduated from Khoy University; commoner background; four black dots forming a square appeared briefly on the back of his hand after the ritual
Klein Moretti.accessories: silver vine-leaf pocket watch carried in linen shirt pocket
Klein Moretti.faction: citizen of Loen Kingdom, Awwa County, City of Tingen; history graduate of Khoy University
Klein Moretti.source_notes: Wore formal clothing, a silk hat, and a handkerchief for his visit to the security company.
Klein Moretti.era_clothing_lock: suit of formal clothing, silk hat, and a handkerchief

Dunn Smith.face_description: Deep gaze, occasionally shows a slight hook at the corners of his lips when showing amusement
Dunn Smith.visual_anchor: mid-aged pale male with slightly high hairline and deep gray eyes, always wearing a black top hat and black knee-length Victorian trench coat, carries a tobacco pipe — codename Nighthawk, Church of Evernight dream-walker
Dunn Smith.distinguishing_features: gray eyes described as deep and hidden in shadow; leads the Nighthawks; references Mandated Punishers, Machinery Hivemind, and other Judiciaries as peer organizations
Dunn Smith.accessories: pipe, golden pocket watch on a golden chain
Dunn Smith.faction: Church of Evernight — Nighthawk Beyonder team
Dunn Smith.source_notes: Text explicitly mentions his gray eyes, pipe, black trench coat, and golden pocket watch.
Dunn Smith.era_clothing_lock: black coat over a waistcoat with a gold watch chain draped across the chest
Dunn Smith.unique_identifier: black top hat concealing slightly high hairline; deep gray eyes; black trench coat reaching knees; carries a tobacco pipe

Rozanne.hair_style: long brown hair (implied by girl description)
Rozanne.visual_anchor: Early 20s female, brown hair, light-brown eyes, bright forehead, wearing a light green Loen-style dress with white lace details.
Rozanne.color_palette: light green, brown, white, soft cream
Rozanne.source_notes: Described directly when Klein meets her at the reception desk.
Rozanne.era_clothing_lock: light green Victorian-style dress accentuated with beautiful lace on the sleeves, collar, and chest

Bredt.primary_clothing: Black top hat, charcoal grey Victorian civilian suit, white shirt, and a dark cravat
Bredt.face_description: A mature and friendly face defined by a thick, bushy black beard and slightly weathered features.
Bredt.visual_anchor: Mid-40s male, thick black beard, wearing a black top hat and a charcoal Victorian civilian suit.
Bredt.color_palette: deep black, charcoal grey, snow white, dark brown
Bredt.source_notes: Identified as a middle-aged civilian staff member with a thick black beard and top hat; celebrating his 15th wedding anniversary.

Old Neil.hair_style: white hair, likely short or medium as it fits under a felt hat
Old Neil.primary_clothing: Classic robe or suit, topped with a round felt hat.
Old Neil.face_description: Deeply wrinkled face where the wrinkles bloom like flowers when he smiles; aged and expressive.
Old Neil.visual_anchor: elderly male, frail build, thinning white hair, wrinkled pale face, wearing worn Victorian clothing, surrounded by documents
Old Neil.distinguishing_features: Believes in temperance to avoid loss of control; skilled in 'luck' based ritual magic.
Old Neil.role: civilian clerk in armory, former formal Nighthawk member
Old Neil.source_notes: Described by Dunn Smith at the end of the chapter.

Welch McGovern.primary_clothing: Expensive Victorian gentleman suit, pale blue waistcoat, white cravat, gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.face_description: Soft features of a wealthy youth, rounded chin, bright curious eyes, friendly expression
Welch McGovern.visual_anchor: early 20s male, fair skin, light brown hair, blue eyes, wearing an expensive pale blue Victorian waistcoat and a gold watch chain
Welch McGovern.distinguishing_features: acquired a notebook from the Fourth Epoch; generous personality; recruited Klein and Naya to help decode it
Welch McGovern.accessories: Gold pocket watch, leather-bound ancient notebook
Welch McGovern.faction: son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom
Welch McGovern.source_notes: Chapter 9 text: 'He was the son of a banker from Constant City, Midseashire, Loen Kingdom' stated explicitly; his role in obtaining the Fourth Epoch notebook confirmed

Naya.primary_clothing: Modest Victorian scholar's dress, high collar, dark green wool
Naya.face_description: Thin face, sharp intelligent eyes, focused expression, narrow nose
Naya.visual_anchor: early 20s female, fair skin, dark brown hair in a low bun, hazel eyes, wearing a dark green high-collar Victorian dress
Naya.distinguishing_features: Died by drowning herself in a washbasin
Naya.source_notes: Police confirmed her death and her soft brown hair was mentioned in Klein's vision/imagination of the scene.

Daly.face_description: uncanny beauty with twinkling emerald eyes and striking blue eyeshadow; face framed by the hood of her black robe
Daly.visual_anchor: strikingly beautiful woman in a floor-length hooded black Victorian robe, twinkling emerald eyes accentuated by blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with white crystal pendant on wrist
Daly.color_palette: deep black, cobalt blue, silver, white crystal
Daly.distinguishing_features: Spirit Medium; prefers working with corpses; uses aromatic floral essences (Amantha, Eye of the Spirit) for mediumship rituals; can perceive and communicate with spirits
Daly.accessories: silver bracelet with white crystal pendant, waist pouch with glass vials
Daly.source_notes: Chapter 14 — detailed physical description given during Klein's examination scene; emerald eyes mentioned twice; full outfit described; Spirit Medium role and Nighthawk affiliation confirmed
Daly.unique_identifier: twinkling emerald eyes, hooded black robe with blue eyeshadow and blush, silver bracelet with hanging white crystal pendant
Daly.era_clothing_lock: floor-length hooded black robe, blue eyeshadow and rouge blush, exposed silver bracelet with white crystal pendant at wrist, waist pouch holding glass vials

Archbishop Chanis.primary_clothing: Black high-collared Nighthawk vestments with silver Evernight emblems
Archbishop Chanis.face_description: Thin, ascetic face with deep-set gray eyes and a solemn, authoritative expression.
Archbishop Chanis.visual_anchor: Elderly male cleric, silver hair, deep-set gray eyes, wearing black Nighthawk vestments with silver moon emblems
Archbishop Chanis.accessories: Silver holy emblem of the Evernight Goddess
Archbishop Chanis.source_notes: Text explicitly names him as the founder of the Nighthawks.

Ince Zangwill.primary_clothing: all-black clergyman robe with buttons on both sides and a soft cap
Ince Zangwill.face_description: high nose, tightly pursed lips, facial features like a classic sculpture without any wrinkles
Ince Zangwill.visual_anchor: 40-year-old male, dark blonde hair, deep blue eyes, blind in one eye, high nose, wearing an all-black clergyman robe with buttons on both sides and a soft cap
Ince Zangwill.accessories: Sealed Artifact 0-08 (a quill that does not need ink to write)
Ince Zangwill.source_notes: Described directly from a wanted poster/photograph in the text.
Ince Zangwill.era_clothing_lock: all-black clergyman robe with buttons on both sides and a soft cap
